message:
✨ Dashboard enhancements, cluster caching, and UI improvements

- Add gradient border to cluster cards (provider color to theme color)
- Add Network/Storage/Compute overview cards to dashboard templates
- Add refresh controls to main dashboard (button, auto-refresh, timestamp)
- Add skeleton loading placeholders for initial dashboard load
- Improve cluster refresh caching - preserve stats during refresh
- Add refreshing indicator to cluster cards
- Deduplicate cluster API calls to prevent multiple simultaneous requests
- Merge new cluster data with existing health data during refresh
- Match Templates/Add Card button styling with other dashboards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
